scripts.generate: corepack pnpm run openapi:dump && orval --config orval.config.ts
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run generate && cp src/index.ts /tmp/api-contracts-index.ts && cp openapi/openapi.json /tmp/api-contracts-openapi.json && corepack pnpm run generate && diff -u /tmp/api-contracts-index.ts src/index.ts && diff -u /tmp/api-contracts-openapi.json openapi/openapi.json
